unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: News about natural disasters.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：dis-（否定/坏）+ aster（星星）= 坏星星，古人认为流星坠落代表灾难。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A large tornado moving across an open field near a building.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：“拖泥带斗”的龙卷风把泥土卷到半空中。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Tick the disasters that you hear: drought.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：dry（干的）演变而来，ough发/aʊ/音，t结尾。干旱无雨。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. (山地或悬崖的)崩塌；滑坡
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What caused the landslide in Seoul?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：land（土地）+ slide（滑动）= 土地滑动，即滑坡。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The landslide made the rocks slide down the mountain.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：s + lide（滑梯）。在游乐场玩滑梯就是slide。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A massive tsunami wave crashing into an Asian coastal city.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 外来语记忆：来自日语“津波”（tsunami），tsu（津，港口）+ nami（波，浪）。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 洪水；大量 & vi. 淹没；大量涌入 & vt. 使灌满水；淹没
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Where are the floods?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：fl（流）+ ood（读/ʌd/，像血blood）。洪水就像流淌的浑水。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Tick the disasters that you hear: volcanic eruption.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：volcanic（火山的）+ eruption（喷发，erupt的名词形式）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What was the magnitude of the earthquake in Ecuador?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：magn（大）+ i + tude（名词后缀，表状态）= 大小、级别。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What are the rescue workers and soldiers doing in the flood-hit area?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：re（再次）+ s + cue（线索/提示）-> 再次发现线索，展开营救。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vt. 损害；破坏 & n. 损坏；损失
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Which buildings were damaged in Seoul?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：dam（大坝）+ age（年龄）。大坝有年龄了，开始受到损坏。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: 2,400 homes destroyed.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：de（向下，变坏）+ stroy（建造，与structure同源）= 拆毁，摧毁。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vt. 疏散；撤出 & vi. 撤离
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Almost 88,000 people evacuated.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：e-（出）+ vacu（空，与vacant同源）+ ate（动词后缀）= 撤空，疏散。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Planes, helicopters used to fight the fire.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：helico（螺旋）+ pter（翅膀）= 旋转翅膀的飞机，即直升机。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: No deaths, no injuries.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词性记忆：dead（形容词，死的）的名词形式，结尾变成th。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vt. 影响；(疾病)侵袭；深深打动
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: 82 killed, 500,000 affected.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：af-（去）+ fect（做，作用）= 产生作用，影响。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 避难处；居所；庇护 & vt. 保护；掩蔽 & vi. 躲避
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Shelters set up by the government.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：shell（贝壳）+ ter -> 像贝壳一样的保护所，避难处。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 裂纹；裂缝 & vi. & vt. (使)破裂
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There were deep cracks that appeared in the well walls.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拟声记忆：噼啪的破裂声，引申为“裂纹，裂缝”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: At least one well had some smelly gas coming out of it.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：gas（煤气/汽油），gas station是加油站。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It seemed as if the world were coming to an end!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：as（如同）+ if（如果）= 就像是，仿佛。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In less than one minute, a large city lay in ruins.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：ru（如）+ in（在...里）= 掉进废墟里了。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: phr. 严重受损；破败不堪
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In less than one minute, a large city lay in ruins.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：in（在...中）+ ruins（废墟）= 处于废墟之中。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 百分之…… & adj. & adv. 每一百中
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: About 75 percent of the city's factories and buildings, 90 percent of its homes, and all of its hospitals were gone.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：per（每）+ cent（百，如cent分币）= 每一百中，百分之。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Bricks covered the ground like red autumn leaves.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：br（桥）+ ick -> 用砖头（brick）砌成的桥。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The railway tracks were now useless pieces of metal.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 对比记忆：metal是金属，mental是精神的。少个n（脑），就只是冰冷的金属。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 震惊；休克 & vt. (使)震惊
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: People were in shock—and then, later that afternoon, another big quake shook Tangshan again.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拟声联想：受到电击或巨大打击时的吃惊反应。像“触电”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: People were in shock.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：in（处于...状态）+ shock（震惊）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Water, food, and electricity were hard to get.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：electric（电的）+ ity（名词后缀）= 电，电能。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vt. 使落入险境 & n. 险境；陷阱
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Soon after the quakes, the army sent 150,000 soldiers to Tangshan to dig out those who were trapped.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：t + rap（说唱）= 说唱歌手掉进了陷阱。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: To dig out those who were trapped and to bury the dead.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：发音像 berry（浆果）。把坏的浆果埋进土里。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Slowly, the city began to breathe again.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词性对比：breath 是名词 /breθ/，加上e变成动词 breathe /briːð/。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Tangshan started to revive itself and get back up on its feet.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：re-（重新）+ viv（活，如vivid生动的）+ e = 重新活过来，复活。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The economic revival of the earthquake zone.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词性记忆：revive（动词）+ al（名词后缀）= 振兴，复苏。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: With strong support from the government and the tireless efforts of the city's people.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：ef-（出）+ fort（强壮，如force力）-> 出力，尽力，努力。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vi. & vt. 统一；(使)成一体
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: People must unify and show the wisdom to stay positive.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：uni（单一）+ fy（使...化）= 使合为一体，统一。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Show the wisdom to stay positive and rebuild for a brighter future.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：wise（聪明的）+ dom（名词后缀，表领域/状态）= 智慧。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Use context to understand new words.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：con-（共同）+ text（文本）= 结合在一起的文本，即上下文。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vt. 遭受 & vi. (因疾病、痛苦、悲伤等)受苦
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What kind of help do you think people who have suffered from a tsunami need?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：suf（向下）+ fer（带/承受）-> 在下面承受痛苦，遭受。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Tick the disasters that you hear: volcano.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 背景记忆：源自罗马神话中的火神武尔坎（Vulcan）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A mountain from which gas, ash, and hot rocks sometimes erupt.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：e-（出）+ rupt（破，断裂）= 破土而出，爆发。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 供应(量)；[pl.] 补给品 & vt. 供应；供给
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The Red Cross Society of China is supplying the disaster-hit area with medical supplies.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：sup（在...下面，引申为补充）+ ply（折叠/填满）= 补充，供应。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A typhoon is an extremely strong wind.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：发音非常接近中文的“台风”。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: in the open air vs in the fresh air
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: People had to sleep in the open air.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 直译记忆：in（在...中）+ open air（开阔的空气中）= 露天。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A hurricane causes massive damage in America.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：“赫里肯”飓风刮得很急（hurry），还卷起甘蔗（cane）。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vi. 生存 & vt. 幸存；度过
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Few sheep and cows survived the snowstorm.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：sur-（在...之上/超越）+ vive（活）= 越过危险活下来，幸存。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 电力；能量；力量；控制力
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Stay away from windows and power lines.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：pow（象声词，出拳的声音）+ er -> 力量，能量。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vi. & vt. 轻叩；轻敲 & n. 水龙头；轻敲
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He tapped on the pipe to make a sound.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拟声词：tap, tap, tap，轻敲的声音。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Water pipes were broken.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：形似一根管子，两个p夹着i，再跟一个e。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vi. 吹口哨；发出笛声 & n. 哨子；呼啸声
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He blew his whistle for help.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拟声词：whistle的发音十分接近吹哨子时的嘘嘘声。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 突发事件；紧急情况
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Prepare an emergency bag.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：emerge（出现，浮现）+ ency（名词后缀）-> 突然冒出来的大事，即紧急情况。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 镇静的；沉着的 & vt. 使平静；使镇静
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Staying calm is the most important rule.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：l不发音，卡姆（calm），安静下来。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 援助；帮助；救援物资 & vi. & vt. 帮助；援助
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We received aid from the people.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：aid 帮助。first aid是急救。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 成套工具；成套设备
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Prepare an emergency bag with water, biscuits, a torch and a first-aid kit.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：猫咪（kitten）的简写是kit。成套的猫咪工具。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: first aid kit vs tool kit
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Prepare an emergency bag with water, biscuits, a torch and a first-aid kit.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：first（第一，紧急）+ aid（援助）+ kit（箱，包）= 急救箱。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Fortunately, volunteers were on hand to help people move.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 直译记忆：就在手边（on hand），随时可以提供帮助。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vt. & vi. 碰撞 & n. 碰撞；撞车
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A truck went out of control and crashed into the back of a bus.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拟声记忆：crash，重物撞击、碎裂的声音。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vt. & vi. 打扫；消灭；彻底消除
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A raging wildfire sweeping through a dense forest.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：s + weep（哭泣）= 拿着扫帚一边扫地一边哭泣。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 海浪；波浪 & vi. & vt. 挥手；招手
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A massive tsunami wave.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：水波（wave）起伏，像手在挥舞（wave）。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vi. & vt. 侵袭；突击；击打 & n. 罢工；袭击
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: An earthquake can strike suddenly.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：保龄球全倒叫strike，给人以强烈的击打和侵袭感。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vt. & vi. 递送；传达 & vt. 发表
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Volunteers delivered food and supplies.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：de（向下）+ liver（肝脏/生命的供给）-> 送达生存必需品，即递送。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Write a summary of the text.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：sum（总数，合计）+ ary（名词后缀）= 总结，概括。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: This project will have a huge effect on girls' education.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 对比记忆：affect是动词（影响），effect是名词（效果）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Write a summary of appropriate length.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词性记忆：long（形容词，长的）的名词形式，发音和拼写发生改变。
